page.heroParagraph: Three steps. Your voice. Scientifically designed to rewire the subconscious patterns that shape who you are, and who you're becoming.
page.socialProof: Join {count} people already transforming their minds
page.sectionTitle: Three steps to a new you
page.sectionParagraph: No forms. No scripts. No production skills. Just a conversation that becomes your daily practice.
page.step1Desc: You don't fill out a form. You have a conversation. A conversational AI guides you through your specific challenges, goals, and emotional context. The things a template could never capture.
page.step1Detail: The AI asks the right follow-up questions. It adapts to what you share. By the end of the conversation, it has everything it needs to create something deeply personal.
page.step2Desc: Your practice is scripted around your exact situation, not generic wisdom. Then it's voiced using your cloned voice (from a 60-second recording) or a professional voice you choose.
page.step2Detail: The audio is mixed, mastered, and ready for daily practice. Everything happens automatically: no recording studios, no editing, no technical skills required.
page.step3Desc: Each morning, press play and hear your own voice guide you. Research shows consistent self-voice repetition creates measurable neural change within 21–66 days.
page.step3Detail: Practice is always free. No subscriptions, no replay limits, no pressure. Just you and your voice, building the identity you've chosen — one morning at a time.
page.testimonialQuote: "The first app that actually made me feel like I was talking to myself."
page.contentTypesParagraph: Not interchangeable. Each type is engineered for a specific level of inner change, from daily reprogramming to permanent identity encoding.
page.affirmationsDesc: Short, powerful statements voiced in your own words. Listen each morning to reprogram the beliefs that shape every decision you make.
page.affirmationsScience: Spaced repetition + personal voice = faster neural rewiring.
page.meditationsDesc: AI-scripted journeys designed for your emotional goals, voiced by you. You hear your own voice guide you to exactly where you need to go.
page.meditationsScience: Theta brainwave entrainment for deep state change.
page.ritualsDesc: Multi-part practices combining breathwork, visualization, and affirmations, all voiced by you. Hearing yourself through the deepest work is what makes it stick.
page.ritualsScience: Somatic + cognitive integration for lasting identity shift.
page.dailyPracticeTitle: Day and night. A practice that changes everything.
page.dailyPracticeParagraph: After waking up. Before sleep. Your voice bookends the day — with theta-wave calm at night.
page.thetaNote: Theta waves (4–8 Hz) dominate sleep onset and deep relaxation. Evening meditation increases theta power — helping you wind down and sleep better.
page.minuteCardTitle: Just 5 minutes morning and night. That's all it takes.
page.minuteCardParagraph: Affirmations after waking up set your day. Meditations before sleep help theta waves (4–8 Hz) support relaxation and memory consolidation. No new schedule. No lifestyle overhaul. Just two bookends that compound over time.
page.scienceTitle: Built on how brains actually change.
page.scienceParagraph1: The brain rewires itself through repeated exposure to emotionally resonant stimuli. No stimulus is more resonant to your brain than your own voice.
page.scienceParagraph2: Hear yourself say "I am confident" daily for 21 days and your neural pathways literally change. Not metaphorically. Measurably.
page.scienceBullet1Desc: to notice the first measurable shift
page.scienceBullet2Desc: for new patterns to become fully automatic
page.scienceBullet3Desc: activates deeper neural pathways than any other
page.voiceCloningParagraph: Record 60 seconds of your natural voice. waQup clones it, then voices everything you create. Your own voice reminding you who you already are.
page.testimonial1Quote: The first app that actually made me feel like I was talking to myself. Hearing MY voice tell me I'm capable hits so differently than reading it off a screen.
page.testimonial2Quote: After 30 days of morning affirmations, I can't believe who I'm becoming. I speak up in meetings now. I didn't think an app could actually do this to me.
page.testimonial3Quote: I've tried every meditation app out there. waQup is the only one that feels truly personal. The ritual creation flow is like therapy on demand, but it's mine.
page.beforeAfterTitle: Something in you knows it's time.
page.before1: Replaying the same limiting stories in your head
page.before2: Generic meditations made for strangers, not you
page.before3: Inconsistent practice that never quite sticks
page.before5: Waiting for the "right moment" that never comes
page.after1: Your own voice guides you to who you're becoming
page.after2: Content crafted around your exact challenges and goals
page.after3: A ritual so personal it becomes non-negotiable
page.after4: Shifts you can feel after just 21 days
page.after5: Ready in minutes. Practiced forever, free.
page.faqSubtitle: Everything you want to know before you begin.
page.faq1Q: How is waQup different from Headspace or Calm?
page.faq1A: Headspace and Calm give you generic content made by strangers. waQup creates personalized content based on YOUR specific goals, challenges, and context, voiced in your own cloned voice. Nothing is generic. Everything is yours.
page.faq2Q: Do I need to record my own voice?
page.faq2A: No. Record 60 seconds of your voice. waQup clones it — or choose from professional voices. Your choice.
page.faq3A: Qs are the credits used to create new content. You earn Qs when you sign up and can purchase more. One thing worth knowing: listening to and practicing your existing content is always 100% free. Qs are only spent during creation.
page.faq4A: Yes. Once your affirmations, meditations, or rituals are created, you can replay them as many times as you want, forever, for free. We believe daily practice should never be gated behind a paywall.
page.faq5Q: What are the three content types?
page.faq5A: Affirmations are short 2–5 min cognitive re-patterning statements for morning routines. Guided Meditations are 10–30 min AI-scripted sessions for state induction. Rituals are 20–60 min multi-part practices for the deepest identity transformation.
page.faq6Q: What is the science behind this?
page.faq6A: waQup is built on neuroplasticity research: the brain's ability to rewire itself through repeated exposure. Hearing positive self-statements in your own voice activates deeper neural pathways than reading or hearing a stranger's voice.
page.ctaSubtext: Join the waitlist and be first to access waQup. No credit card required. Practice is always free — Qs only power creation.
page.mockupChatQ: What's your biggest challenge right now?
page.mockupChatA: Self-doubt when I speak up at work

page.faq1Q: How is waQup different from Headspace or Calm?
page.faq1A: Headspace and Calm give you generic content made by strangers. waQup creates personalized content based on YOUR specific goals, challenges, and context, voiced in your own cloned voice. Nothing is generic. Everything is yours.
page.faq2Q: Do I need to record my own voice?
page.faq2A: No. Voice cloning is optional. You can choose from our curated library of professional voices, or clone your own with just a 1-minute recording. Most people find hearing their own voice the most powerful, but both options work beautifully.
page.faq3A: Qs are the credits used to create new content. You earn Qs when you sign up and can purchase more. One thing worth knowing: listening to and practicing your existing content is always 100% free. Qs are only spent during creation.
page.faq4A: Yes. Once your affirmations, meditations, or rituals are created, you can replay them as many times as you want, forever, for free. We believe daily practice should never be gated behind a paywall.
page.faq5Q: What are the three content types?
page.faq5A: Affirmations are short 2–5 min cognitive re-patterning statements for morning routines. Guided Meditations are 10–30 min AI-scripted sessions for state induction. Rituals are 20–60 min multi-part practices for the deepest identity transformation.
page.faq6Q: What is the science behind this?
page.faq6A: waQup is built on neuroplasticity research: the brain's ability to rewire itself through repeated exposure. Hearing positive self-statements in your own voice activates deeper neural pathways than reading or hearing a stranger's voice.

getQs.title: Get Qs

page.heroParagraph: Neuroplasticity, self-voice encoding, and spaced repetition — the mechanisms that explain why hearing your own voice say affirmations works when reading or hearing a stranger does not (Rogers, Kuiper & Kirker, 1977; Lally et al., 2010).
page.neuroP1: The brain changes through repeated exposure to emotionally resonant stimuli. No stimulus is more resonant to your brain than your own voice.
page.neuroP2: Hear yourself say "I am confident" daily and your neural pathways literally change. Lally et al. (2010) found habit formation takes 18–254 days (average 66), not the often-cited 21 — consistency over intensity.
page.neuroBullet2Desc: average for patterns to become automatic (Lally et al., 2010)
page.neuroBullet3Desc: daily 5–10 min beats occasional long sessions
page.quoteDivider: Your subconscious filters out strangers. It responds to you.
page.pillarsTitle: Why your own voice changes everything
page.pillarsSubtitle: Three mechanisms explain why waQup works when generic affirmations and meditation apps fall short.
page.pillar1Desc: Hebb's law (1949): neurons that fire together wire together. Repeated exposure to emotionally resonant stimuli physically reshapes neural pathways. Affirmations heard in your own voice activate deeper circuits than reading or hearing a stranger.
page.pillar1Science: Lally et al. (2010, Eur. J. Soc. Psychol.): 18–254 days to form habits, avg 66 days. Consistency matters more than intensity.
page.pillar2Tagline: Your brain trusts your voice most
page.pillar2Desc: Rogers, Kuiper & Kirker (1977): self-referential processing encodes 30–40% more strongly. Steele's self-affirmation theory (1988): reflecting on values through speech reduces defensive resistance. The subconscious responds to your voice differently than to strangers.
page.pillar2Science: Self-voice bypasses the critical mind and reaches identity-shaping circuits directly.
page.pillar3Tagline: Waking and sleep onset are gateways
page.pillar3Desc: Hypnagogic (pre-sleep) and hypnopompic (post-wake) states show theta dominance (4–8 Hz) and reduced critical-mind engagement. Stickgold et al. (2000): sleep consolidates and reprocesses memories. Practice at these moments amplifies encoding.
page.pillar3Science: Theta-rich states lower analytical resistance — ideal for subconscious rewiring.
page.timingTitle: Why morning and night work best
page.timingSubtitle: The science of transitional states: theta waves, sleep onset, and the critical mind's lowered resistance.
page.timeline1Desc: Hypnopompic state: theta lingers after waking. The critical mind hasn't fully engaged. Affirmations heard then bypass resistance and encode directly (Stickgold, 2000).
page.timeline2Desc: Hypnagogic state: theta (4–8 Hz) dominates as you drift off. Sleep-dependent consolidation strengthens what you practice (Stickgold et al., 2000).
page.timeline3Desc: Lally et al. (2010): short daily practices more effective than occasional long sessions. Two 5‑minute bookends that compound over weeks.
page.voiceCloningParagraph: Record 60 seconds of your natural voice. waQup clones it, then voices everything you create. Your own voice reminding you who you already are.
page.ctaSubtext: Join the waitlist and be first to access waQup. No credit card required. Practice is always free — Qs only power creation.

page.heroSubhead: A scroll-down story about why waQup exists.
page.section1P1: Most affirmation and meditation tools gave me someone else's voice telling me what to believe. It never landed. The words felt distant — like advice from a stranger, not truth from within.
page.section1P2: I discovered something different when I started writing my own scripts, recording them in my voice, and listening every day. The manual process was tedious: scripting, recording, mixing in Ableton, structuring my practice. But it worked. My subconscious actually shifted.
page.section1P3: That path was shaped by years of working with sound — as a DJ and music producer under {nuMoksa} and {cronaxy}. Sound has always been my medium: mixing, mastering, understanding frequencies. It taught me how deeply audio affects the subconscious — and why your own voice, speaking your intentions, is unmatched.
page.insightTitle: Transformation happens when you speak your own intentions.
page.insightP1: Most tools tell you what to believe. waQup lets you encode your own beliefs — in your own voice, with your own words.
page.insightP2: Personal transformation requires personal language. The real power is hearing your own voice reinforcing your identity.
page.whyExistsP1: waQup exists to simplify that process. Instead of scripting, recording, and organizing manually, the system guides you. You focus on clarity of intention — what you want to become, what you want to strengthen — and waQup handles the rest.
page.whyExistsP2: Your voice. Simplicity. Accessibility. What used to require dedication and technical setup is now available to anyone willing to do the inner work.
page.representsP1: waQup is more than an app. It's a philosophy: tools should help people express themselves, not tell them what to think. Technology should empower inner clarity, not add noise. Identity can be shaped intentionally — and the most powerful tool for that is your own voice.
page.representsP2: I believe in building tools that empower people rather than control them. No manipulation. No pressure. Just access to something that actually works.
page.founderQuote: waQup exists because something simple changed my life, and I believe more people should have access to it.
page.founderStory: I spent years removing every barrier between that experience and anyone who needs it. The manual process I used — scripting, recording, mixing — is now a conversation, a few taps, and your voice. That's waQup.
page.founderRole: Founder, waQup. DJ and music producer — Nu Moksa, Cronaxy.

community.headline: Shift together
community.subhead: When we each work on ourselves — clarity, intention, identity — we contribute to something larger. Small circles of intention create ripples.
community.body1: Collective consciousness isn't mystical — it's many people choosing to show up differently.
community.body2: waQup started with one person. It grows as more people use their own voice to shape who they're becoming.
community.body3: Join others who practice. Share, learn, and witness what happens when intention becomes collective.

forTeachers.title: For Teachers & Coaches
forTeachers.subtitle: Give your clients personalized voice practices.

page.heroBody: Create a growing library of guided meditations, breathwork, and rituals — without audio editing software. Publish to the marketplace. Earn credits every time a student shares.
page.submitted: You're on the list. We'll reach out with your Teacher Starter Kit.
page.disclaimer: Free to join · Teacher Starter Kit included · No credit card
page.stepsTitle: From intention to published session in 4 steps
page.step1Sub: Speak or type your intention — theme, duration, tone, focus.
page.step2Sub: AI writes the script. Your voice (or a professional voice) renders it with ambient and binaural layers.
page.step3Sub: One tap. Your session appears in the waQup marketplace and gets a shareable public link.
page.step4Sub: Every share of your content earns you Qs. More students, more credits, more sessions.
page.benefit1Body: Speak your intention once. waQup turns your words into a polished guided meditation — in your voice, with ambient layers and binaural tones.
page.benefit2Body: One-click publish. Your sessions become discoverable by thousands of practitioners actively looking for new guided content.
page.benefit3Body: Every share earns you Qs. The more your students spread your work, the more creation power you accumulate — automatically.
page.benefit4Title: Build a library, not just a class
page.benefit4Body: Group your sessions into themed series — 7-Day Nervous System Reset, Morning Ritual Pack, Sleep Deepening Series. Your students get a complete experience.
page.benefit5Body: Describe your intention. waQup writes the script, you approve or edit it, then render audio with your voice. No recording sessions, no editing software.
page.benefit6Body: See play counts, share counts, and credits earned per session. Understand what resonates so you can create more of what works.
page.comparisonRow4WaQup: Students can customise for their practice
page.ctaTitle: Ready to build your audio library?
page.ctaBody: Join waQup as a teacher and get your Teacher Starter Kit — pre-loaded credits, themed templates, and early marketplace listing access.

page.heroBody: Create personalised affirmations, meditations, and rituals as client homework — in minutes. Private sharing, unlimited free replays, and cohort publishing for group programmes.
page.submitted: You're on the list. We'll reach out with your Coach Starter Kit.
page.disclaimer: Free to start · Client homework in 5 minutes · No recording equipment needed
page.pain3: No scalable way to personalise audio homework
page.pain4: Recording takes longer than the session itself
page.workflowTitle: A workflow that fits after every session
page.workflow1Sub: You identify the core belief or state to reinforce
page.workflow2Sub: Describe the client's context. waQup generates the script.
page.workflow3Sub: Client gets an unlisted link — their personal audio homework.
page.workflow4Sub: Unlimited free replays. You see usage signals. Next session, they're ahead.
page.benefit1Body: Type or speak the key themes from a session. waQup generates a full script — affirmation set, grounding meditation, or identity-based ritual — instantly.
page.benefit2Body: Each personalised audio takes minutes to create, not hours. Batch multiple clients in a single sitting. Your time stays in sessions, not production.
page.benefit3Body: Share via private link — unlisted from the public marketplace. Your client gets their homework; your methodology stays yours.
page.benefit4Body: Audio they can replay freely. No credit needed to listen. Clients come back to sessions with more progress because they actually practiced.
page.benefit5Body: Running a group programme? Create one foundational ritual, then personalise it for each participant. Series publishing makes cohort delivery seamless.
page.benefit6Body: Affirmations for belief-level work. Meditations for nervous system regulation. Rituals for identity encoding. The right format for the right coaching objective.
page.ctaTitle: Ready to give every client personalised audio?
page.ctaBody: Join waQup as a coach and get your Coach Starter Kit — pre-loaded credits, private sharing, and cohort-ready features.

page.heroBody: Create audio in your voice. Drop series to your followers. Earn revenue when they subscribe. waQup is the link-in-bio audio studio built for creators who care about depth.
page.submitted: You're on the Creator list. We'll reach out about your Creator Pack.
page.disclaimer: Free to start · Earn from day one · Revenue share at Partner tier
page.benefit1Body: Create audio in your voice — your tone, your energy, your words. Not a generic AI voice. ElevenLabs voice cloning makes it yours.
page.benefit2Body: 5-Day Reset. 7-Day Abundance Shift. 21-Day Rewire. Group your sessions into series and release as drops your followers actually collect.
page.benefit3Body: Your followers share your practice. You earn credits and revenue. The more reach your content gets, the more waQup gives back to you.
page.benefit4Body: See exactly where plays and shares come from. Know which content resonates. Optimise your drops like you optimise your posts.
page.benefit5Body: One link to your practice series. A beautiful immersive player. An email capture that builds your list even when followers don't sign up immediately.
page.benefit6Body: Partner-tier creators earn a percentage of subscriptions attributed to their audience. As you grow, waQup grows with you.
page.tiersSubtitle: As your content reaches more people, your earning tier rises automatically. No applications, no waiting periods.
page.ctaTitle: Your voice. Your audience. Your revenue.
page.ctaBody: Apply for the Creator Pack — pre-loaded credits, co-branded player templates, and direct support for your first series drop.

page.heroBody: QR codes in your studio link to beautiful audio experiences — savasana, nidra, breathwork — created in your voice. Students scan, listen, and discover their own practice.
page.submitted: You're on the list. We'll reach out with your Studio QR Bundle.
page.disclaimer: Free to start · QR bundle included · Zero paid ads needed
page.momentsTitle: Every moment in class becomes a lasting practice
page.moment1Sub: Students arrive anxious. A 3-minute QR-accessible breathwork sets the tone before class starts.
page.moment2Sub: Your voice guides the final integration. Students scan the QR on their way out and take it home.
page.moment3Sub: Box breathing, 4-7-8, coherence breathing — create a library of your signature protocols students can access anywhere.
page.moment4Sub: Every retreat should end with a practice students can maintain. waQup makes the continuation frictionless.
page.loop1Sub: A savasana script, grounding ritual, or breathwork guide — in your voice, with ambient layers.
page.loop2Sub: waQup creates a QR code for any published session. Print it, post it, put it on cards.
page.loop3Sub: QR → immersive audio player. No app required. Plays directly in the browser.
page.loop4Sub: Every student who signs up from your QR loop earns you referral credits. Their first session is free to listen, always.
page.qrGeneratorNote: The QR generator is built into every published session — print it, display it on screen, add it to your studio cards, or embed it on your website.
page.ctaTitle: Your studio. Their practice. Every day.
page.ctaBody: Join as a studio and get the Studio QR Bundle — credits to create your first savasana, nidra, and breathwork sessions, plus QR cards ready to print.

preLaunch.headline: We're finishing the app.
preLaunch.subheadline: waQup is almost ready. Join the waitlist to get notified, become a beta tester for early access, or share with others and earn credits when they join.
preLaunch.ctaBetaDesc: Get early access before launch. Help shape the product and receive hands-on sessions.
preLaunch.shareEarnDesc: Invite friends and colleagues. When they join and complete onboarding, you both get 10 Qs.
preLaunch.forTeachersDesc: Give your students or clients personalised voice practices. Explore our programme for educators.
preLaunch.earlyAccess: Early access · No card · Practice free

waitlistCta.fillFormSuffix: to share your intentions and get priority access.
waitlistCta.bannerSubtext: Join the waitlist and be first to access waQup when it launches.

foundingModal.title: Founding Members
foundingModal.body: Founding members get 50 credits free, 1 month free, and lock in lifetime pricing at €6.99/month.

getQs.signInPrompt: Sign in to purchase. We'll bring you back here after you log in.
getQs.qPacksBody: Qs power affirmations, meditations, and rituals. Buy once — they never expire.
getQs.trustPoint1: Qs never expire — use them at your own pace
getQs.trustPoint3: Instant delivery after payment. Secured by Stripe
getQs.wantMonthlyAllocation: Want a recurring monthly allocation instead?
